notes:
**New**

- **Sync status that tells the truth.** The sync indicator now reports what actually happened — what was pushed, pulled, applied, or is still waiting — on every platform, instead of showing a generic "synced" that could hide notes still in flight. (PRD Addendum 16; Sync Deep Audit 2026-07-17.)
- **Export Diagnostics.** A one-tap way to export a privacy-safe diagnostics bundle when something looks wrong with sync — device and sync metadata only, never your note content, and it stays on your device until *you* choose to share it. Reach it from **Settings → About** or **Cmd+K** on desktop, **Settings → Help** on iOS, and **Help & about** on Android. (PRD Addendum 14 §N8.2, Privacy Invariant; Sync Deep Audit 2026-07-17.)
- **Devices enroll under their real names.** Each device now registers with its actual name, so your device list reads "iPhone" and "MacBook" instead of every entry claiming to be "Desktop." (Sync Deep Audit 2026-07-17, RC3.)

**Fixes & polish**

- **Notes created before you turned on sync now sync everywhere.** Content that pre-dated sync being enabled had no sync history and was silently left behind on the device it was written on; it is now backfilled and reaches your other devices. (Sync Deep Audit 2026-07-17, RC1 — the missing-notes fix.)
- **Two devices, one title, no more duplicates or stuck notes.** When two devices independently create a note with the same title, they now merge into a single note instead of duplicating, colliding, or getting parked — and this now covers **all** note types: daily journals, regular notes, and `[[wikilink]]`/`#tag` pages alike. (PR #563; Sync Deep Audit 2026-07-17, RC3 — generalized from the daily-note merge to every note type.)
- **Deleting a note can no longer discard a newer edit from another device.** A note deletion used to hard-delete even blocks that had just been edited elsewhere; a newer edit now wins and brings the note back. (Sync Deep Audit 2026-07-17, RC2.)
- **Synced notes show up in Recent.** A note edited on another device now re-sorts into Recent, the sidebar, and All Notes, the way a local edit always did. (Sync Deep Audit 2026-07-17, RC1.)
- **The note list refreshes right after a sync on iPhone and Android.** No more pull-to-refresh guessing — freshly synced notes appear as soon as they land.
- **Pinned-note order syncs.** The manual order of your pinned notes now travels between devices. (PRD Addendum 22 §6.2.)
- **Copying a nested block keeps its children under the copy.** Pasting a block and its children now re-homes the copies under the pasted parent instead of re-attaching them under the original. (PR #554.)
- **Copying a selected link, tag, block reference, or image now copies its text.** A single selected `[[link]]`, `#tag`, `((block reference))`, or image now lands on the clipboard as its token instead of nothing. (PR #555.)
- **Selecting a single character keeps its highlight and toolbar.** A one-character text selection is no longer mistaken for an atom, so its selection band and floating toolbar stay put. (PR #556.)
- **The caret no longer lands inside an emoji** when another device saves while you're typing near one. (PR #557.)
- **A collapsed block stays collapsed** after it saves and you reload. (PR #558.)

**Under the hood**

- Op-log **genesis backfill** synthesizes the missing folder/note/block ops for content that pre-dated op-logging, bounded per pass and draining across cycles, behind the **`op_backfill`** kill switch. (Sync Deep Audit 2026-07-17, RC1.)
- Orphan and collided ops now **park with backoff** and raise a quiet alert rather than being dropped, self-healing when their prerequisite arrives. (Sync Deep Audit 2026-07-17, RC4.)
- Server hardening: **per-vault push serialization** (a transaction-scoped advisory lock so pushes commit in seq order — the "notes missing on iOS for two days" cause), a **key-generation CAS guard** against keyring regression, and a **per-op schema-level floor**. (Sync Deep Audit 2026-07-17, RC5/RC6; ADR-0018.)
- Mobile file logs are **PII-free**, in line with the Privacy Invariant. (PRD Addendum 14 §N8.2.)
